prompts: /plan "look at the html snippet apps/plugin/docs/fb-convo-with-attachements.html and update the extract for the attached image files to be a part of the message with the file data included as meta data with the message. Make sure that the data is getting extracted. Update our conversation UI panel to show the links in the conversation messages with a link to open the file."

We are not seeing the links for the images, (it would be nice for a thumbnail that is clickable) in the extension UI in the conversations panel. Here is the conversation JSON export file we have and a screenshot. Let's update the UI to show the documents and links and ensure we are extrcting it correctly and sending it into the UI.'/home/andre/Downloads/propflow-conversation-24064639926523887 (2).json'

When we are creating the drafts in marketplace, the drafts are always getting set to 'Rent' in the 'Home for Sale or Rent' dropdown selector. This is incorrect and changes what fields are filled in. Also, the listing isn't generating a AI anonymized image of the property, however it generating an anonymized AI description. The AI description has should not be using an template if the auto-select template is turned off.

The Selection of the 'For Sale' or 'Rent' for the property didn't go well, here is the HTML snippet that is the listbox popup to choose from :
Rent
For Sale
The form fill on the marketplace draft is using weird looking dynamic class names and not the previous DOM based approach.
